overall.description: Gameplay footage from Grand Theft Auto V showing a player character navigating urban Los Santos streets at night. The scene features neon-lit commercial buildings, passing vehicles, and pedestrians, with the player moving from a busy intersection past a FLEECA bank through residential avenues.

segments.scene_description: The player stands at a night-time urban intersection dominated by a FLEECA bank building on the left and neon-lit commercial buildings across the street. Several vehicles pass through the intersection while the player observes from the sidewalk before beginning to walk.

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the street and walks along the sidewalk, passing residential apartment buildings on the right. A pedestrian in white stands near the curb as the player turns left to continue along the path, with street trees and a bus stop visible on the left.

segments.scene_description: The player walks down a wide avenue lined with apartment buildings on the right and palm trees visible in the distance. A white delivery van passes by on the left as the player approaches an intersection where a corner building with a green awning comes into view.

segments.scene_description: The player turns left at the intersection, approaching a street corner where a group of pedestrians stands near a building with a green striped awning. A yellow fire hydrant is visible on the sidewalk as the player moves closer to the group.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban intersection that gradually transitions into a quieter residential avenue. It begins on a sidewalk beside a FLEECA bank, observing vehicles passing through a bright commercial hub before the camera moves forward to cross the street. As the player walks, the scene shifts from the glow of commercial buildings to a residential stretch lined with apartment blocks, passing a pedestrian in white and a bus stop. The path then opens into a wide avenue where palm trees appear in the distance and a white delivery van passes by, leading the camera toward a far intersection. Finally, the movement turns left at the corner, approaching a group of pedestrians gathered near a building with a green striped awning and a yellow fire hydrant.
